evidence_purpose: Define substantiation requirements when advertising references third-party certification marks or registration badges.
summary: Certification marks in ads require verifiable certificate records covering product scope and applicable market.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Certification mark or registration badge in ad creative. ACTION: Request certificate record reference. CHECK: Issuer recognition, scope, expiry, legibility. ESCALATE IF: Mark implies approval beyond certificate class.

checks: Confirm issuer is recognized certification body for target market
Verify certificate scope covers advertised product SKU or category
Confirm certificate is legible at published ad resolution
reject_if: Certificate expired at time of review
Scope does not cover advertised product
